basic_details.job_title: IIT (BHU) Varanasi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (BHU) Varanasi (IIT (BHU) Varanasi) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 28 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT (BHU) Varanasi Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering or related branch.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: M. Tech. in Mechanical Engineering or related branch. Two years research experience is desirable.

salary_details.details: Fixed Stipend/Fellowship/Salary amount of Rs. 43,750/- p. m.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT (BHU) Varanasi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT (BHU) Varanasi Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at IIT (BHU) Varanasi is 19th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M. Tech. degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related branch. Additionally, two years of research experience is desirable for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed stipend/fellowship/salary of Rs. 43,750/- per month for the Project Assistant role.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant position at IIT (BHU) Varanasi as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT (BHU) Varanasi Project Assistant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of IIT (BHU) Varanasi. Please check the 'Important Links' section for the website link.

faq.question: Q7. What documents need to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit self-attested copies of all mark sheets and certificates starting from high school, along with details of any research or work experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title for which this recruitment is being made?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a project entitled “Low Cost Solar Panel Cleaning System” at IIT (BHU) Varanasi.

faq.question: Q9. Who is the contact person for sending the application?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent to Dr. Debashis Khan, Professor, Department of Mechanical Engineering, Indian Institute of Technology (BHU) Varanasi -221 005.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age limit mentioned for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any specific age criteria.
